offer: For logistics carriers managing 5-15 vehicles, inconsistent vehicle maintenance causes unexpected breakdowns. We provide predictive service alerts instead of manual tracking of maintenance schedules.
problem: Inconsistent vehicle maintenance leading to unexpected breakdowns.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for logistics carriers
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to logistics carriers with demo video
Community forums sharing tools for logistics carriers
try_it: Let users try maintenance tracking and service alerts on 1-3 vehicles
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for ease
CSV import feature for existing service records
Streamline onboarding process with fewer steps
